review: The battery life on this phone is absolutely amazing. I can easily go two days without charging it.
Decent display, but the phone heats up very fast when playing heavy games. Not ideal for gamers.
Camera is terrible in low light. For this price, I expected much better photo quality.
Charging speed is super fast! Goes from 0 to 100 in just 30 minutes. Loving the build quality too.
Software is very buggy. It crashes randomly when I open the camera app.
Incredible performance, multitasking is a breeze. The display is vibrant and sharp.
Overheating is a real issue. Just browsing the web makes it warm.
Battery degradation happened within 3 months. Now I have to charge it twice a day.
Best price to performance ratio in the market right now. The camera is decent for daylight.
Solid build, but the software feels a bit unpolished. Battery is fine.
